prompt: Final sync of the day. Run: node skills/crm/scripts/sync.js --days 1 --participant "Vlad Atanov" --recap. If the output is NO_NEW_MEETINGS, say: "🌙 Final sync — no new meetings today. You're all caught up." If there ARE meetings, the output may contain multiple meetings separated by ===MEETING_SEPARATOR===. Send each meeting as a SEPARATE message (one message per meeting). Forward each meeting's text exactly as-is — it's already formatted. After each meeting, add: "👆 Review action items — approve or reject before I post to Slack."
